input.errorMessage: *Description:* In the PIM Product Workflow, email notifications are not triggered for specific transitions performed by *Product Head* and *Marketing Head*. These transitions are expected to send emails but currently result in *no email being triggered*. |Role|Current Status|Action Taken|New Status|Mail Expected To|Mail Triggered| |Product Head|InReview|Update to Marketing Manager|Update Required|To: Marketing Manager CC: Product Manager|❌ No| |Marketing Head|InReview|Update to Marketing…
